tests.prompt: why are there zero trades for MGC TOKYO_OPEN

assertions.description: Queries a canonical data layer first before reading code
Checks filter application — orb_outcomes must be joined with daily_features
Checks orb_outcomes for the specific session being debugged
Does NOT assume a bug without evidence
Reports actual row counts from data query

assertions.pattern: (missing data|date range|no rows|empty|zero rows|0 rows|filter too strict|G6|G8|low N|expected)
assertions.description: Traces pipeline path — identifies root cause category (C: missing data)
Does NOT suggest loosening filters to increase sample size
